title: cyperus dactyliformis var. gueinzii
intro: Cyperus dactyliformis var. gueinzii, also known as Cape flats sedge, is a variety of flowering plant in the sedge family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Cyperus dactyliformis var. gueinzii include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
